prompt: I built and installed the app on simulator. It launched and rendered the main screen. Now I need to test a deep link: myapp://item/123. Walk me through capturing evidence that the deep link actually works.
expected_output: Response should invoke ios-validation, Step 7 (lines 119-140). (1) Get booted simulator UDID. (2) Open deep link: 'xcrun simctl openurl $UDID "myapp://item/123"'. (3) Wait 2 seconds. (4) Screenshot: 'xcrun simctl io $UDID screenshot e2e-evidence/ios-deeplink-item-123.png'. (5) Open the screenshot and describe: does it show the item detail screen? If deep link doesn't work, screenshot shows wrong screen (e.g., home screen instead of detail). THAT'S evidence.
